name: f1-fantasy-live-score
description: Live data scraping service for F1 Fantasy. Scrapes real-time driver and constructor scoring data every 30 seconds.

scripts.aci:deploy: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --template-file infra/aci/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/aci/azuredeploy.parameters.json
scripts.aci:status: az container show --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --name f1-fantasy-live-score-aci --query "{ProvisioningState:provisioningState, State:containers[0].instanceView.currentState.state, IP:ipAddress.ip, FQDN:ipAddress.fqdn}" --output table
scripts.aci:events: az container show --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --name f1-fantasy-live-score-aci --query "containers[0].instanceView.events" --output table
scripts.deploy:aci: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --name "live-score-aci-${DEPLOYMENT_SUFFIX:-manual-$(date +%s)}" --template-file infra/aci/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/aci/azuredeploy.parameters.json --output none --only-show-errors
scripts.deploy:scheduler: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --name "live-score-scheduler-${DEPLOYMENT_SUFFIX:-manual-$(date +%s)}" --template-file infra/scheduler/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/scheduler/azuredeploy.parameters.json --output none --only-show-errors
scripts.deploy:logicapps: npm run deploy:scheduler && npm run deploy:grant-runner-msi
